About Sagar

I'm Sagar, and I freeze your beautiful moments

With over 4 years dedicated to wedding photography, I have built a reputation for capturing the raw, unfiltered emotions that make your wedding day truly unique. My approach is cinematic and intimate — I blend into your celebration, letting moments unfold naturally while I quietly document the love, laughter, and tears that define your story.

My expertise in candid photography means I capture the glances, the embraces, and the quiet in-between moments that are often missed. Beyond stills, I bring your story to life through cinematic highlight films, meticulously crafted in Adobe Premiere Pro with an editorial eye for pacing, colour, and emotion.

📍 Based in India  •  Available Worldwide
Candid Photography Premiere Pro Editing Cinematic Films Wedding Coverage Color Grading
120+ Weddings Shot
50+ Cinematic Films
100% Happy Couples
Services

What I Offer

01 📷

Wedding Photography

Full-day wedding coverage that captures every chapter of your celebration — from bridal prep to the last dance.

  • Full day coverage (12–16 hrs)
  • 700+ professionally edited photos
  • Online gallery delivery
  • Print-ready high-res files
Inquire Now
02 🤍

Candid Photography

Natural, unposed storytelling that captures the authentic emotions and fleeting moments that define your day.

  • Documentary style approach
  • Emotion-first photography
  • Minimal posing, maximum truth
  • Pre-wedding candid sessions
Inquire Now
03 🎬

Cinematic Films

Breathtaking highlight reels and full wedding films, meticulously crafted in Adobe Premiere Pro with cinematic colour grading.

  • 3–5 min highlight film
  • Full ceremony edit available
  • Premiere Pro colour grading
  • Cinematic audio mixing
Inquire Now
Kind Words

What Couples Say

"

Sagar has an extraordinary gift for being in the right place at the right moment. Our wedding album is full of photos we didn't even know were being taken — genuine tears, laughter, and love. We treasure every single image.

A
Ananya & Vikram Wedding · Hyderabad, 2024
★★★★★
"

The highlight film Sagar created for us was absolutely cinematic. Every time we watch it, we relive the entire day. His editing in Premiere Pro is next-level — the pacing, the music, the colours — it's a masterpiece.

P
Priya & Rohit Wedding Film · Mumbai, 2024
★★★★★
"

We were nervous about candid photography, but Sagar made us completely forget he was there. The result is an honest, beautiful documentary of our wedding day that feels real and timeless.

S
Simran & Arjun Wedding · Jaipur, 2023
★★★★★
"

From the first consultation to the final delivery, Sagar was professional, warm, and creative. He truly understood our vision and delivered photographs that exceeded every expectation. Highly recommend!
